name: Pork Carnitas
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Center Loin Roast (boneless, cut into 2 x 1/4-inch strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. See Sowest 3 for recipe.
2. Roast and peel the Poblano Chiles as directed in Sowest 1, then seed them.
3. Prepare the Center Loin Roast by cutting it into 2 x 1/4-inch strips.
4. Combine the diced garlic with the vegetable oil, tomato paste, red wine vinegar, and salt in a bowl.
5. Add the chopped Italian Plum Tomatoes to the mixture.
6. Place the seasoned pork strips into a slow cooker or Dutch oven.
7. Pour the sauce over the pork and cook until tender and flavorful.
8. Serve hot with flour or corn tortillas and sour cream.
